perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a red t-shirt, glasses, and a grey flat cap speaks to the camera, gesturing with his hands. (2) The scene cuts to a split-screen view with the man on top and a digital rendering of 'PokéPark KANTO' on the bottom. (3) The video transitions through several CG animated scenes showing Pokémon in a natural environment: an Oddish in a forest, a close-up of Pikachu, Eevees in a field, and a Dragonite flying over a landscape. (4) The man returns to full-screen, speaking enthusiastically and pointing at the viewer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track starts. A male voice speaks in a friendly, energetic tone. (2) The background music continues as the man describes the park; subtle nature sound effects and Pokémon-style chirps are heard during the CG transitions. (3) The vocal speech ends with a final energetic sentence, and the music swells slightly before cutting off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translating the narrator's spoken content. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large bold captions appearing centrally: 'PokePark KANTO', '2026年春天' (Spring 2026), and '你也是寶可夢迷嗎' (Are you also a Pokémon fan?). (3) Top-left corner includes social media handles for Facebook and Instagram for '3ctim'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Information Delivery with Visual Aids -> Direct Call-to-Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male with short hair, wearing black-rimmed glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a bright red short-sleeved t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blurred indoor room with a shelf and neutral-colored wall; transitions to various CG-rendered natural environments including forests and grassy hills.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to announce and build excitement for the opening of the new 'PokéPark KANTO' theme park in Japan. By combining a trusted tech influencer's commentary with officially-styled CG graphics of Pokémon, the video effectively informs the audience about the location and date while inviting social media interaction through a closing question.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Promoting a specific brand's new project with high production value B-roll.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of 'Tim哥' branding and signature enthusiastic hand gestures.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical high-energy tech-vlog style intended for social media platforms like TikTok or Reels.
